overall.description: A character rides a large white avian mount through a narrow rocky canyon at dusk, transitioning from enclosed walls to an open valley. The footage is clearly game engine rendered with cinematic lighting, atmospheric haze, and fantasy elements including small humanoid NPCs standing along the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow rocky canyon with steep walls

events.description: small humanoid NPC figures become visible standing on the right side of the path

agents.ego_description: riding a large white avian mount forward through the narrow canyon at a steady pace

notable_agents.action: small humanoid figure standing still on the grassy bank watching the rider pass

entered.detail: tall rocky cliff face with layered sedimentary stone textures
steep rock wall with sparse grass growing in crevices
narrow winding trail through the canyon floor with patches of grass
hazy silhouetted mountains visible through the canyon opening

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a third-person view following a rider on a white avian mount through a narrow canyon. Tall rocky walls flank both sides of the dirt path, creating an enclosed feeling. Small humanoid NPC figures stand motionless on the right bank as the rider passes by, and distant mountains are visible through the hazy canyon opening ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition zone where canyon begins to widen

events.description: canyon walls recede significantly and the path widens into a valley

agents.ego_description: continuing to ride forward as the canyon gradually opens up, passing patches of tall grass and bushes

notable_agents.action: distant small figure standing near the canyon wall

entered.detail: dense bushes and tall grass growing along the canyon floor

segments.scene_description: As the rider progresses, the canyon walls gradually recede and the path widens. The vegetation becomes denser with bushes and tall grass lining the trail. The canyon walls that were previously close are now further away, and the distant mountains appear closer through the atmospheric haze.

scene_state.functional_zone: open valley with sunset sky and distant torch light

events.description: warm orange sunset light becomes prominent as the canyon opens fully to the sky
mount turns slightly to the left revealing more of the open valley landscape

agents.ego_description: riding into the open valley, turning slightly left to navigate toward a lit torch post while surveying the wider landscape

notable_agents.action: figure standing near a lit torch post in the valley
distant figure walking in the open grassland

entered.detail: wooden post with bright flame providing warm orange light against the dusk sky
wide grassy valley floor between distant mountain ranges

segments.scene_description: The canyon opens completely into a wide valley as the sun sets, casting warm orange light across the scene. A lit torch post becomes visible on the left, marking a transition point. The mount turns slightly to navigate the open terrain, revealing distant mountains silhouetted against the colorful dusk sky while scattered NPCs stand or walk in the valley.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a narrow, enclosed canyon that gradually expands into a vast, sunlit valley at dusk. It begins by trailing a rider on a white avian mount along a dirt path flanked by towering rocky walls and motionless humanoid figures. As the rider progresses, the canyon walls recede and the trail widens, allowing denser vegetation and tall grass to emerge while the distant mountains grow clearer through the atmospheric haze. The scene then opens completely into a wide valley, where the lighting shifts to a warm orange glow and a lit torch post marks the transition to the open terrain. Finally, the mount turns slightly to reveal a panoramic view of scattered NPCs and silhouetted mountains against a colorful sunset sky.
